description: Lithic provides payments infrastructure for card issuing, money movement, and program management. Its platform supports creating and managing cards, account holders, balances, transactions, and related payment workflows.
summary: Lithic exposes a REST Developer API at `https://api.lithic.com/v1` authenticated with a Lithic API key, plus a documented Lithic MCP server that also uses Lithic-issued credentials; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
